overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage of a hooded character poling a wooden boat through the canals of a historic Middle Eastern city. The character navigates through waterways lined with stone buildings and wooden scaffolding, passing under fabric canopies and stone bridges in bright daylight.

scene_state.functional_zone: open canal with market stalls on left bank

agents.ego_description: standing on wooden boat and poling steadily through the canal

notable_agents.action: standing on wooden dock watching the boat pass

entered.detail: green fabric awning covering a market stall on the left bank
tall stone minaret rising above the buildings in the distance
wooden plank dock extending into the water on the left side
rope bridge spanning the canal between buildings ahead
tall palm tree visible above the rooftops on the right

segments.scene_description: The character poles a wooden boat through a sunlit canal, passing a green market awning on the left bank where a figure stands on a wooden dock. Stone towers and a rope bridge are visible in the distance ahead, with palm trees rising above the right bank.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered canal passage under fabric canopy

events.description: boat passes under large fabric canopy, casting shadows over the water

agents.ego_description: continuing to pole the boat forward under the shaded canopy

entered.detail: large orange-brown fabric canopy stretched across the canal overhead
extensive wooden scaffolding along the left stone walls
wooden scaffolding and platforms on the right canal walls

segments.scene_description: The boat moves under a large fabric canopy that shades the canal, creating a semi-covered passage. Wooden scaffolding lines both stone walls as the character continues poling through the narrower waterway.

events.description: exits the covered canopy into a narrow section with close stone walls

agents.ego_description: poling through the narrowest section of the canal between high walls

entered.detail: nets hanging from wooden poles on the left scaffolding
stone arch bridge spanning the canal in the distance ahead

segments.scene_description: Emerging from under the canopy, the canal narrows significantly with wooden scaffolding and stone walls pressing close on both sides. A stone arch bridge becomes visible in the distance ahead as the character continues poling forward.

scene_state.functional_zone: canal approaching stone bridge with passing traffic

events.description: another boat with a poler appears on the right side of the canal
boat passes under the stone arch bridge

agents.ego_description: poling toward and then under the stone bridge while passing another boat

notable_agents.action: standing in another boat on the right, also poling in the same direction

entered.detail: wooden boat with a figure poling, moving parallel on the right side

segments.scene_description: The canal widens slightly as the character approaches a stone arch bridge. Another boat with a poler appears on the right, moving in the same direction. The character passes under the stone bridge as the journey continues through the historic waterway.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a sunlit canal that transitions from an open waterway into a narrow, shaded passage before emerging under a stone bridge. It begins with the character poling a wooden boat past a green market awning and a figure on a dock, with palm trees and distant stone towers framing the bright horizon. As the boat moves forward, the scene shifts into a semi-covered passage beneath a large fabric canopy, where wooden scaffolding begins to line the stone walls. The waterway then narrows significantly, pressing the scaffolding and stone closer together before the camera reveals a stone arch bridge ahead. Finally, the canal widens slightly to allow another poler to appear on the right as the character passes under the arch of the bridge.
